payload.answer: SQL query execution denied. BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED is set to false, which disables direct SQL access to memory_cards. Enable the flag or use standard Brain API methods to query memory.
payload.decision: DENY - SQL execution blocked when BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false

entity_resolution.reason: Debug SQL flag is disabled; query execution not permitted

payload.intent: Execute SQL query on memory_cards table with debug SQL disabled

memory_cards.statement: SQL query execution is disabled when BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED flag is set to false

details: Query blocked by access control policy
Debug SQL mode is currently disabled

repair_options: Set BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true to enable SQL debug mode
Use Brain API query methods instead of raw SQL
Contact system administrator to enable debug SQL access
